name: NOAA/NWS KSEA latest weather observation
owner_publisher: NOAA National Weather Service / U.S. National Weather Service API
terms_summary: NWS API data is published for public use; callers should identify their application and respect cache/forecast-office load guidance.

provenance.inclusion_criteria: Official public weather station endpoint with stable airport coordinates; no private camera, credential, probing, or raw visual retention.
provenance.terms_summary: NWS public weather data; attribution/application identification requested by API guidance.

view.caveat: Weather station is point telemetry, not visual coverage.

caveats: Point weather telemetry only; it cannot verify visual crowd, traffic, or street-level claims.
Use NWS API politely with application User-Agent and cache TTL.

name: NOAA CO-OPS Seattle water level latest reading
provider: NOAA Center for Operational Oceanographic Products and Services
terms_summary: NOAA CO-OPS publishes public operational oceanographic data; cache and attribution caveats apply.

provenance.inclusion_criteria: Official public NOAA tide station feed with stable station coordinates; no private camera, credential, probing, or raw visual retention.
provenance.terms_summary: NOAA public operational data feed; not a certified legal tide product.

view.caveat: Water-level station does not provide a visual field of view.

caveats: Water-level telemetry does not prove nearby street-level conditions.
Use as environmental context, not as direct visual confirmation.
